name: Azeret Arriaga
text: During first-time entry, questions I'd already answered weren't registered — it would be nice if the app auto-saved so you don't have to start all over. (Severity: Med)

name: Azeret Arriaga
text: The 'Find AI for your work' Discover button isn't working — it lets me select the text but doesn't take me anywhere, which blocks getting to Discovery. (Severity: High)
